rewritten_requirements: The system shall restart and begin running from a shut down condition.
The system shall enter configuration mode when changes or power-saving settings are required.
The system shall return to running state after configuration is completed.
The system shall collect data when triggered by the clock while running.
The system shall prepare and send out a weather summary upon request.
The system shall check its own status and transmit the result upon request.
The system shall return to running state after performing an activity (data collection, summary preparation, or status checking).
The system shall move into a controlled mode through remote control.
The system shall return to shut down condition if a shutdown command is given while running.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The weather station can be restarted from a shut down condition.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: From there, it can either be restarted and begin running

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The weather station can enter configuration mode when changes or power-saving settings are needed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: or it can go into a configuration mode when changes or power-saving settings are needed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After configuration is finished, the weather station returns to running state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the configuration is finished, it returns to running

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: While running, the weather station can collect data triggered by the clock.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It may collect data when triggered by the clock.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The weather station prepares and sends out a weather summary upon request.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It may prepare a weather summary when a weather report is requested, and after the summary is ready, it sends the information out.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The weather station checks its own status and transmits the result upon request.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It may also check its own status when a status report is requested, and then transmit that result as well.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After performing an activity (data collection, summary preparation, or status checking), the weather station returns to running state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After each of these activities, it goes back to running normally.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The weather station can be moved into a controlled mode through remote control.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The system can also be moved into a controlled mode through remote control.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If a shutdown command is given while the weather station is running, it returns to shut down condition.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: And if a shutdown command is given while it is running, it returns to the shut down condition.
